description.ko: 광섬유와 빛나는 데이터 패턴으로 생물학적 생명을 초월한 미래형 꽃을 묘사합니다.
description.en: A futuristic flower where biological life is transcended by fiber optics and glowing data patterns.

prompt: A hyper-macro cinematic shot of FLORA-9, a digital orchid with #89CFF0 fiber-optic petals that pulse with liquid data. The stem is constructed from #50C878 emerald circuit boards, set against a dark #4A0E4E velvet void. Glowing #FFB6C1 fractal pollen particles drift in a soft-focus bokeh effect of falling binary code. Iridescent liquid droplets cling to the leaves. 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, a perfect fusion of organic nature and advanced technology.
